zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert Henry Collett於1410年出生在英國米德萊可倫敦 聖 基路士 維特 可利普萊加特時，他的父親Richard Colet Of The Hale At Wendover30歲，母親Margaret Colet Of the Hale At Wendover29歲。他於1440年與Christiana Knyvett在英國瓦維其可爾塞頓 可爾德費爾德結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1505年在英國英格蘭倫敦斯特普尼享年95歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾傑爾特納姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert Henry Collett于1410年出生在英国米德萊可倫敦 聖 基路士 維特 可利普萊加特时，他的父亲Richard Colet Of The Hale At Wendover30岁，母亲Margaret Colet Of the Hale At Wendover29岁。他于1440年与Christiana Knyvett在英国瓦維其可爾塞頓 可爾德費爾德结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1505年在英国英格兰倫敦斯特普尼享年95岁，埋葬在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾傑爾特納姆。

nameMeanings.name: Collett
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from a pet form of the personal name Col(l), a pet form of Nicholas . There was also a feminine form, Collette, which may also have given rise to a surname. The name could also mean ‘Coll the younger’.

variants.name: Nicholas
meanings: English (southwestern England and south Wales) and Dutch: from the personal name Nicholas (from Latin Nicolaus, from Greek Nikolaos, from nikān ‘to conquer’ + laos ‘people’). Forms with -ch- are due to hypercorrection (compare Anthony ). The name in various vernacular forms was popular among Christians throughout Europe in the Middle Ages, largely as a result of the fame of a 4th-century Lycian bishop, about whom a large number of legends grew up, and who was venerated in the Orthodox Church as well as the Catholic. In North America, the English form of the surname has absorbed cognates from other languages and also their patronymics and other derivatives, e.g. Croatian and Serbian Nikolić (see Nikolic ), Greek Papanikolaou ‘(son of) Nicholas the priest’ and Nikolopoulos . Compare Nickolas .

History: The colonial official and revolutionary patriot Robert Carter Nicholas was from a prominent VA family on both sides. His father was a British navy surgeon who emigrated c. 1700 from Lancashire, England, to Williamsburg, VA.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Robert Henry Collett was born in 1410, in London St Giles without Cripplegate, Middlesex, England, his father, Richard Colet Of The Hale At Wendover, was 30 and his mother, Margaret Colet Of the Hale At Wendover, was 29. He married Christiana Knyvett in 1440, in Sutton Coldfield, Warwickshire, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1505, in Stepney, London, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 95, and was buried in Cheltenham, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert Henry Collett est né en 1410, à London St Giles without Cripplegate, Middlesex, Angleterre, son père, Richard Colet Of The Hale At Wendover, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Margaret Colet Of the Hale At Wendover, avait 29 ans. Il a épousé Christiana Knyvett en 1440, à Sutton Coldfield, Warwickshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1505, à Stepney, Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 95 ans, et a été enterré à Cheltenham, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

Er hat 1440 in Sutton Coldfield, Warwickshire, England Christiana Knyvett geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1505 im Alter von 95 Jahren in Stepney, London, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Cheltenham, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert Henry Collettが1410年にイギリスミッドレセックスロンドン スト ギレス ウィソウト クリップレガトで生まれた時，父Richard Colet Of The Hale At Wendoverは30歳，母Margaret Colet Of the Hale At Wendoverは29歳であった。1440年にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアスットオン コルドフィールドでChristiana Knyvettと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1505年にイギリスイギリスロンドンステプニーで95歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアチェルテンハムにて埋葬された。

ko.London St Giles without Cripplegate, Mid: 영국 미들레세스 런던 스트 자일스 위토우트 크리플레가트
ko.lifeSummary: Robert Henry Collett(이)가 1410년 영국 미들레세스 런던 스트 자일스 위토우트 크리플레가트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard Colet Of The Hale At Wendover(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Colet Of the Hale At Wendover(은)는 29세였다. 그는 1440년 영국 워윅실르 수턴 콜드필드에서 Christiana Knyvett(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1505년 영국 잉글랜드 런던 스테p니에서 95세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 헬텐함에 묻혔다.

Ele casou-se com Christiana Knyvett em 1440, em Sutton Coldfield, Warwickshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas. ru.London St Giles without Cripplegate, Mid: лондон ст джилесь витоут крипплегэит, миддлесекс, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert Henry Collett родился в 1410 г. в местности лондон ст джилесь витоут крипплегэит, миддлесекс, Англия, его отцу по имени Richard Colet Of The Hale At Wendover было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Colet Of the Hale At Wendover, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Christiana Knyvett в 1440 г. в местности суттон колдфиелд, варвиккшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1505 г. в местности степни, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 95 лет и был похоронен в местности челтенам, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Christiana Knyvett en 1440, en Sutton Coldfield, Warwickshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1505, en Stepney, London, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 95 años, y fue sepultado en Cheltenham, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
